epigraph.quote: Originally a mill, again lots of water, very, very pretty. Cows, goats, hens, peacocks. Clean loos.

moments.quote: We stayed the night in their garden, using the bathroom in the bungalow. Great!
We went for a walk up Windmill Hill.
The wood turner made a rattle for Charles.

moments.place: West Kennet Long Barrow, Wiltshire, UK
moments.quote: we walked up to West Kennet Long Barrow, into the Neolithic Burial Chamber.
We drove on and looked around Devizes. Antique Book Shop, drinks.
In the evening we walked a mile along the foot path up to the Bear for supper
At the top of the field a tree had blown over + we had to climb up 10ft to get over it.
We walked around Lacock, very pretty, weavers' houses.
A delicious cream tea at the Bridge Tea Room. Violin with Lion head.

moments.place: Stowford Farm, near Trowbridge, Wiltshire, UK
moments.quote: Originally a mill, again lots of water, very, very pretty. Cows, goats, hens, peacocks. Clean loos.
We've brought Thomas a plaster angel with guitar.
